text: Frank — Tony Jr. sat through my entire opening study session yesterday and asked why the Sicilian Defense is named as it is. He is seven. I may have created a problem for myself.
Ha! Future federation president right there. Does Eric even play?
Eric plays occasionally and loses graciously to Linda, which constitutes the full extent of his competitive career. I have registered Tony Jr. for the Silver Spring youth clinic in July.
Perfect fit. You gonna coach him yourself?
I intend to supervise. Whether that constitutes coaching remains an open question. Linda has already observed that I am not known for patience with blunders.
